prompt: A stylized half-body portrait of a brilliant young woman inventor in a dark, moody studio, rendered as a warm amber-and-copper digital painting with semi-realistic detail and subtle sketch-like linework. She faces forward in a relaxed upright pose, cropped from about mid-torso upward, with long dark brown hair swept loosely over one shoulder, a few flyaway strands rim-lit by orange backlight, and thin clear-framed eyeglasses partly visible. Dress her in a glossy mustard-yellow bomber jacket over a deep burgundy turtleneck sweater. The lighting is dramatic and cinematic: a glowing spherical lattice lamp sits behind her on the left, casting a golden halo and warm edge light around her hair and jacket, while the rest of the background fades into charcoal brown shadow. Behind her, integrate the feeling of a visual memory map or inventor's mind palace: faint technical sketches, geometric construction lines, and handwritten scientific notes drawn directly onto the background like illuminated chalk. Include exactly 2 large wireframe forms on the right side: 1 tilted basket-like lattice ellipsoid near the upper right and 1 faint rectangular diagram with axis-like guide lines near the lower right. Include exactly 1 glowing lattice sphere lamp on the lower left. Add small handwritten text in the upper right that reads “TPMS” with three bullet-like lines underneath: “gyroid”, “diamond”, and “primitive”, and a small formula note reading “E = hv” near the right-center. The overall mood should feel intelligent, elegant, flattering, and slightly futuristic, like a portrait merged with a conceptual memory interface. Use a rich palette of burnt orange, gold, auburn, brown-black, and wine red, with high contrast, luminous highlights, and a polished editorial-art finish.
